description: Announce your seasonal holiday deals with this free Christmas email template. This holiday-themed message is part of our Product Launch set and is ideal for sharing info for all your new products. The green-and-coral color scheme provides a nice backdrop for your new items and the clear CTAs make it easy for customers to learn more. Beauty, skincare, and wellness ecommerce brands can all benefit from using this email around Christmas or other winter holidays. The Christmas email template is completely free to use and can be exported as a ZIP file for easy viewing.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
